## Pull Request Template

### Description

[Provide a brief description of the changes]

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Security improvement

### Related Issue

[Reference the issue number this PR addresses, e.g., "Fixes #123"]

### Testing

[Describe the testing you performed]

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm start`
- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Linux

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented complex code where necessary
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove the fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally

### Screenshots (if applicable)

[Add screenshots to help demonstrate the changes]

### Legal Acknowledgment

- [ ] I have read and understood the [LICENSE](LICENSE) terms
- [ ] This contribution is for educational purposes only
- [ ] I am not violating any third-party Terms of Service

---

**Thank you for contributing to ViceBrain!**
